title: natural_features v1.3: Robust ASR + Alignment
summary: Harden ASR and alignment into a production-grade subsystem that can start from audio-only inputs, produce reliable word and phoneme timing, and emit quality-controlled, reproducible outputs for downstream language and phonological modeling.
problem_statement: Current ASR/alignment paths are functional but not robust: alignment refinement is still passthrough, long-audio behavior is limited, phoneme-level timing contracts are missing, and QC metrics are too shallow for scientific reliability.
goals: Automatically generate transcript + aligned timestamps when transcript input is missing.
Provide real alignment refinement (not passthrough) with explicit backend contracts.
Emit both word-level and phoneme-level aligned outputs with stable schemas.
Improve robustness on long audio via chunking, overlap, and stitching.
Expose strong QC metrics and provenance for filtering and audit.
Keep heavy dependencies optional and preserve fallback behavior.
non_goals: Guaranteeing perfect alignment for all recording conditions.
Mandating one specific aligner backend for every language.
current_gaps: whisperx alignment stage is currently passthrough.
No canonical phoneme interval output contract.
Limited long-audio chunk/stitch logic and drift correction.
QC coverage is minimal (confidence summaries only).

in_scope: ASR transcript generation when transcript is absent.
Word alignment refinement using real backend integration.
Phoneme alignment outputs (interval events + optional posterior views).
Recipe + CLI support for robust speech-language pipelines.
out_of_scope: Cross-language pronunciation lexicon curation at large scale.

functional_requirements.name: Transcript Fallback Contract
functional_requirements.description: If transcript is not supplied, ASR must generate transcript segments and word events with timestamps, confidences, and provenance metadata.

functional_requirements.name: Real Alignment Backend Execution
functional_requirements.description: speech.align.whisperx must perform real timing refinement when backend is available, not passthrough.

functional_requirements.name: Backend Abstraction for Aligners
functional_requirements.description: Define aligner interface supporting whisperx (primary), MFA (optional), and gentle (legacy optional plugin).

functional_requirements.name: Word Event Canonical Output
functional_requirements.description: Emit canonical word EventSeries with onset_s, offset_s, label, confidence, speaker_id(optional), and aligner metadata.

functional_requirements.name: Phoneme Event Canonical Output
functional_requirements.description: Emit canonical phoneme EventSeries aligned to time with label namespace metadata (ARPABET/IPA/CTC-normalized).

functional_requirements.name: Long Audio Chunk and Stitch
functional_requirements.description: Support chunked ASR/alignment with overlap, boundary deduplication, and monotonic global timestamps.

functional_requirements.name: Speaker-Aware Path
functional_requirements.description: Optional diarization path to attach speaker turns and speaker IDs to aligned words.

functional_requirements.name: Alignment QC Report
functional_requirements.description: Generate structured QC report with dropped tokens, low-confidence spans, duration outliers, boundary jitter, transcript coverage, and backend/fallback info.

functional_requirements.name: Interchange Format Support
functional_requirements.description: Import/export CTM and TextGrid, and JSON-native alignment manifests.

functional_requirements.name: Recipe and CLI Ergonomics
functional_requirements.description: Expose robust ASR+alignment in recipes and CLI with clear flags for backend selection and strict/fallback behavior.

functional_requirements.name: Reproducibility Metadata
functional_requirements.description: Record ASR model ID/revision, aligner backend/version, params hash, chunk policy, and fallback reasons in artifacts.

functional_requirements.name: Downstream Compatibility
functional_requirements.description: Aligned outputs must work directly with language embeddings, phonological/articulatory mapping, TR rendering, and design matrix export.

non_functional_requirements.name: Determinism
non_functional_requirements.description: Given same inputs and model artifacts, alignment outputs are stable within numeric tolerance and identical metadata fingerprints.

non_functional_requirements.name: Reliability
non_functional_requirements.description: Transient backend errors are retried with bounded backoff; permanent failures surface actionable errors or explicit fallback outputs.

non_functional_requirements.name: Performance
non_functional_requirements.description: Long-audio mode must stream/chunk without unbounded memory growth.

non_functional_requirements.name: Observability
non_functional_requirements.description: QC and provenance fields must be queryable via catalog and visible in run reports.

non_functional_requirements.name: Security
non_functional_requirements.description: No secrets or sensitive provider config values persisted in metadata, reports, or manifests.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Audio-only input without transcript produces non-empty segments + words with monotonic timestamps and confidences.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Integration test on Tier A synthetic speechlike file.

acceptance_criteria.statement: When whisperx is installed, refinement modifies at least one word boundary on known test audio and QC mode reports true alignment backend execution.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Backend-enabled integration test with known reference transcript.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Phoneme EventSeries is emitted with declared label namespace and valid interval ordering.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Unit and integration tests for namespace mapping and monotonic interval checks.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Long-audio chunk mode returns stitched timestamps with no overlaps, no regressions in monotonicity, and bounded memory profile.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Synthetic long-audio stress test with chunk overlaps.

acceptance_criteria.statement: CTM/TextGrid roundtrip preserves token labels and timestamps within tolerance.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Roundtrip parser/writer tests with fixture files.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Repeated runs with same inputs/models generate stable metadata hashes and reproducible alignment outputs (tolerance-bounded).
Aligned words/phonemes can be rendered to TR and combined with other feature spaces without schema adaptation.
CLI exposes one-pass robust ASR+alignment command path with backend selection, strict/fallback mode, and QC export.

implementation_plan.name: Contracts and Scaffolding
deliverables: Aligner backend protocol and runtime selection.
exit_criteria: No API break for existing speech workflows.

implementation_plan.name: WhisperX Real Integration
deliverables: Replace passthrough with real whisperx refinement path.
Strict and fallback behavior parity with ASR subsystem.

implementation_plan.name: Phoneme Alignment Outputs
deliverables: Label namespace normalization and metadata tagging.
Articulatory mapping directly from phoneme intervals.
exit_criteria: Phoneme outputs integrate with existing articulatory features.

implementation_plan.name: Long-Audio Robustness
exit_criteria: No memory blowups on stress fixture.

implementation_plan.name: Interchange and Tooling
deliverables: CLI + recipe wiring for backend selection and QC output.
Catalog query helpers for alignment artifacts.

implementation_plan.name: Hardening and Benchmarking
deliverables: Regression fixtures for known-truth speech data.

unit_tests: Chunk stitch edge-case tests (boundary collisions, empty chunks).
integration_tests: End-to-end recipe with speech-language preset and TR rendering.
reference_data: SNL sentence dataset subset (audio + known sentence text).
Optional truth-aligned benchmark set for boundary tolerance checks.
metrics: Word boundary MAE (ms) vs reference alignment.

packaging_strategy.core: No heavy aligners in base install.
packaging_strategy.policy: gentle remains optional legacy plugin, not default backend.

risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Ship strong QC outputs and conservative defaults; expose strict mode.
Backend abstraction + adapter layer + pinned integration tests.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Long-audio stitching introduces subtle boundary errors.
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Property-based boundary tests and known-truth benchmark fixtures.
Explicit namespace metadata and normalization utilities with tests.

open_questions: Should MFA become first-class in-repo or remain plugin-only in v1.3?
Which languages beyond English need P0 support for alignment outputs?
Do we require diarization in v1.3 or keep it P1 behind optional extras?
Should CTM/TextGrid import be strict by default or permissive with warnings?
